name: python3-threadpoolctl
title: python3-threadpoolctl
summary: Python helpers for common threading libraries (BLAS, OpenMP)
description:
Python helpers for common threading libraries (BLAS, OpenMP)
Thread-pool Controls provides Python helpers to limit the number of threads
used in the threadpool-backed of common native libraries used for scientific
computing and data science (e.g. BLAS and OpenMP).
.
Fine control of the underlying thread-pool size can be useful in workloads
that involve nested parallelism so as to mitigate oversubscription issues.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-threadpoolctl because Python helpers for common threading libraries (BLAS, OpenMP).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-threadpoolctl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-threadpoolctl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-threadpoolctl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
